description_long: This object is a roadside pedestrian crossing sign mounted on a vertical black post. The main sign is a yellow diamond with a black silhouette of a walking person, indicating a pedestrian crossing zone. Below the diamond, there is a smaller rectangular yellow sign with a black left-pointing arrow, directing attention to the location of the crosswalk. The signs have a metallic sheen and are bordered in black for visibility. The rear of the signs is plain and lacks any markings or graphics. The post appears sturdy and is likely made of metal to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A yellow diamond pedestrian crossing sign with a black walking figure and a left-pointing arrow, mounted on a black metal post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pedestrian crossing symbol and left-pointing arrow clearly.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and post, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the signs and the supporting post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign and post.
